updates.message: Started at around 2026-06-08 01:00CEST, data-proxy is experiencing an unexpected issue. Some features, such as sane URL creation, may not function properly.
updates.memo: data proxy ssl cert expired. informed on #tech-support at 0850 CEST. hopefully it gets fixed soon.

updates.message: The underlying infrastructure will undergo maintenance on 2026-06-02 17:00 CEST. The maintenance is expected to last 1 hour. Some features, such as saneURL, and some volumes may not load properly
The maintenance has been delayed until 2026-06-03 1600CEST.
The issue has been resolved.

Between 2026-05-29 and 2026-05-31, some datasets may not have displayed properly. This issue has now been fixed. You may still see some stale content. It should fix itself within a few hours. Alternatively, you can try to use an incognito browser to see the fresh content.
updates.memo: siibra-snapshot commit 6446d2381e9eb8dbf0fbf6b1b85ca86803e12156 introduced the issue. 5fb8c727663183e737c7a10cf9ade605497f0831 fixed it.

updates.message: Started at around 2026-06-01 01:00CEST, data-proxy is experiencing an unexpected issue. Some features, such as sane URL creation and resolution, some atlas volumes may not function properly.
updates.memo: data proxy ssl cert expired. informed on #tech-support at 0831 CEST. hopefully it gets fixed soon.

updates.message: The issue has now been resolved
An infrastructure issue is affecting the performance of siibra-toolsuite. The services affected include: spatial search of features
updates.memo: JSC maint caused HPA malfn. Basically functionallity operational thansk to Redis.

updates.message: The issue is now resolved
There is a known issue with infrastructure hosting siibra services. Some features may be unstable or unreliable.
Issue resolved
updates.memo: k8s pvc corrupted and needed to be rebuilt. sxplr pointed to docker compose instance on jsc cloud VM, now restored.

updates.message: We are investigating an issue affecting some of our services.
A network issue within the underlying infracture is causing degredation of some services. Spatial feature queries is affected.
The incident has been resolved.
updates.memo: Orthodox Easter long weekend, unfortunately, so the issue lingered for a bit until Athena can address the issue.

updates.message: The underlying infrastructure of siibra-toolsuite (data-proxy) are scheduled to be undergoing maintenance on 2026-03-04 (whole day). Some of the services may not be working as intended.
The maintenance has been completed.
Issue reported.
Issue resolved

past.title: Maintenance of infrastructure scheduled on 2025-12-03 and 2025-12-04.

updates.message: The underlying infrastructure of siibra-toolsuite are scheduled to be undergoing maintenance on 2025-12-03 (whole day) and 2025-12-04 (whole day). Some of the services may not be working as intended.
Issue resolved

past.title: Maintenance of data-proxy scheduled on 2025-11-28 and 2025-12-01.

updates.message: An ebrains data-proxy maintenance is scheduled to start on 16:00CET 2025-11-28 (Friday). Some services, such as sane URL creation and retrieval may not work properly.
Update completed
An issue has been discovered on NFS mount. As a result, some image volumes is currently not accessible.
The storage issue had been resolved
